content.en:
Among the Ancient Star Clan, the proportion of clansmen with the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment Ancient Star Body is not very large, but the number of Ancient Star Clan people is large, so Ye Tian has no shortage of replica objects at all.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian copied a large number of Ancient Astral Ultimate Ancestral Fu, and began to fuse these Ancient Astral Ultimate Ancestral Fus in a quiet place.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully fused these ancient astral bodies with the ultimate ancestral endowment, and obtained an ancient astral eternal ancestral endowment.

Next, Ye Tian left the Star Ancient Domain, returned to the Void Source Palace, moved the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestral Endowment to the main body, and then returned to the Xingchen Ancient Domain, which was just a waste of time for him, but he permanently obtained an Eternal Ancestral Endowment with an extraordinary origin, which was definitely earned.

this day.

Ye Tian came to an area of the Ancient Star Clan's stars, where there were a large number of stars, as well as countless Ancient Star Clans.

Suddenly, Ye Tian used his copying talent to sense some invincible people, and these invincible people did not belong to the Gu Xing Clan.

"Outsiders!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

I am afraid that these people are from a certain force or a temporary combination, the purpose is to snatch eternal resources, and even have a goal, about to start, otherwise they will not be gathered together.

Ye Tian did not show up, but hid in the dark, waiting silently.

If these people do it, he might be able to seize the eternal resources!

didn't let Ye Tian wait long, these people finally made a move.

Bang!!!!

A first-class invincible person made a move, killing a large number of ancient star clan powerhouses in an instant, and rushed into an area.

"Outsiders, you dare to invade our Solium!"

A tall Ancient Star Clan turned into a huge body, frantically resisting these first-class invincibles, and roared in his mouth.

Solomon is a force among the Ancient Star Clan, and it is not a very small force, although there is no supreme, but there are also many first-class invincibles, in the outside world, he is also comparable to a powerful saint-level force.

The body and soul of a first-class invincible person are one, and the body of the ancient star clan is very terrifying, so after becoming a first-class invincible, there is no defect in either the body or the soul, and the defense is extremely terrifying.

The attacks of several first-class invincible people fell on this ancient star clan powerhouse, and even his defenses could not be broken at all.

Boom!

The powerhouse of the Ancient Star Clan blasted away several first-class invincibles with one punch, showing an invincible posture.

Abrupt.

The body of this Ancient Star Clan was shrouded in a light shroud, and the next moment the light shrouded out, and this Ancient Star Clan was instantly annihilated.

Then, the mask was put away by a first-class invincible and turned into a small golden cover.

Obviously, this is a source device.

Surreptitiously.

"This first-class invincible is not weak, he killed a first-class invincible of the ancient star clan with one blow, he should be a son of the void!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But there was no information about this Void Child in his information, and it was obvious that the other party had not entered the Void Source Palace.

Not all geniuses aspire to become children of the void, and many top forces know about the situation of the Void Source Palace, so they will not let their juniors or members of the forces participate in the assessment of the Void Source Palace.

Because in the source sea, there are many opportunities comparable to the Void Source Monument, and it is not necessary to comprehend the Void Source Monument.

There was no powerhouse comparable to the Son of the Void in the Crystal Gate, and soon a powerhouse of the Ancient Star Clan comparable to the Son of the Void fought with that first-class invincible.

However, not all of the members of Solomon were in the headquarters, so their strength was insufficient, and the outsiders were well prepared, so the combat power completely crushed the ancient star clan of Solomon Gate.

Of course, Solomon only needs to hold on for a while, and there will inevitably be the high-level of the Ancient Star Clan to come to the rescue.

Boom!

The treasury of Solomon was opened, and all the invincible aliens rushed to the treasury in an attempt to rob it of its eternal resources.

Ye Tian also wanted to enter the treasure house and snatch the eternal resources.

But he blended in and rushed into the treasure house, only to find that there were no eternal resources here.

Eternal resources are easy to identify, and the breath is difficult to hide, but there is no breath of eternal resources here, only a trace of breath remains.

"Eternal resources have been transferred!"

The other invincibles speculated.

And the biggest suspicion is the ancient star clan powerhouse who has the combat power comparable to that of the children of the void - Peerless!

The eternal resources are likely to be in the Jeor, and it is very difficult for them to kill the Jeor.

As a result, these first-class invincibles can only rob the other resources in the treasury to make up for the losses.

After a few breaths, the invincibles began to flee.

After all, this mission is considered a failure, and it is almost hopeless to obtain eternal resources, so I can only leave here.

Seeing that the outsiders were leaving, he was immediately relieved.

Although Solomon suffered a lot of losses this time and many strong people died, as long as he is still there, Solomon will still be there, and he will be able to recover sooner or later.

But at this moment, a terrifying force acted on him.

The void around him shattered, and even his body couldn't stop crumbling and annihilating, and countless particles collapsed.

Soon, his consciousness vanished, and he was instantly killed.

Around him, a hand carried away his Void Orb.

The person who made this shot was naturally Ye Tian, and he cast a supreme ancestral skill level of shattering the void in the air, instantly shattering the body of the peerless sect.

With the combat power of his Lord of the Void, it was naturally easy to kill a Child of the Void.

Although they are both first-class invincible, the difference in strength between the two sides is like a world apart.

Soon, Solomon Systech's support arrived.

A Supreme One descended here, and when he saw the situation of Zenmon, he was immediately annoyed, and at the same time, he also saw the body of Solomon that was almost shattered.

"Desperate to be killed!"

The Supreme One was shocked.

The strength of the Peerless Sect is not weak, it is famous in the entire Ancient Star Clan, and it has only entered the land of inheritance, such a genius was actually killed?

It stands to reason that except for the Supreme One, no invincible person can kill the Peerless Sect, and at most he will only injure him.

What's more, the battle had only happened for a short time, and it was definitely the supreme who killed the Absolute Gate in such a short time.

"Who is it?"

He suspected that it was the Ancient Star Clan's own people, because it was a well-known thing that the Supreme of the Outsiders could not enter the Star Ancient Domain.

The other side.

Ye Tian obtained the Void Ball of the Peerless Gate, and immediately investigated the resources inside the Void Ball.

"Very poor!"

Ye Tian didn't look down on the resources of the Peerless Gate, after all, the Ancient Star Clan was confined to the Xingchen Ancient Domain, so naturally it was impossible to be too rich.

In addition to the eternal resources, Ye Tian couldn't look down on other resources.

"There really are eternal resources!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
